message:
🌱 Add comment to ai-fix workflow to force refresh

GitHub Actions cache issue - workflow_dispatch not recognized

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
